attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
CAST(EL.UNIQUE_ID AS VARCHAR(50) CASESPECIFIC) AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,CAST('CG' AS CHAR(8)) AS ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD
,NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(RTR.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)) as ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
,CASE WHEN (WSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR WSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)
		THEN 'BUNDLE' 
	 ELSE 'STANDALONE' 
 END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,CAST(COALESCE(CAST(RTR.ATTR_PCT/CASE WHEN RTR_SUM.SUM_RTR_PCT=0 THEN 100  ELSE RTR_SUM.SUM_RTR_PCT  
END AS DECIMAL(18,6)),
CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,6)))*100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,COALESCE(RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(8))) AS SALES_MOTION_CD 
,COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)) AS SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL.TRX_ID AS SK_TRX_ID_INT
,NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT)) AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL.TRANSACTION_TYPE AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME  -- MAY NEED TO ADD BOOKED DATE CONDITION
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY AS ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
,NSOLNT.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
,COALESCE(CAST(RTR.ATTR_PCT/CASE WHEN RTR_SUM.SUM_RTR_PCT=0 THEN 100 ELSE RTR_SUM.SUM_RTR_PCT
 END AS DECIMAL(18,6)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,6)))  AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
--,EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS START_TV_DTM
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM

FROM
(SEL NSOLNHT.* FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNHT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ERP_ACV_RTR_INCR WI_INCR
ON WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
)NSOLNHT

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNT
ON NSOLNT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSO.SUMMARY_ORDER_FLG<>'Y'
LEFT JOIN (SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, MAX(START_TV_DTM)  SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV
     WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'  AND POB_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN' 
     AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
     GROUP BY 1) WSOA 
     ON WSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  
  /* NRS MPOB Change */
LEFT JOIN (SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, POB_TYPE_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV 
     WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'  AND ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'OFFSET' AND POB_TYPE_CD = 'MPOB'  
     AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
     GROUP BY 1,2) WSOA_MPOB 
     ON WSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB EL
ON COALESCE(EL.ERP_LINE_ID,EL.ERP_PARENT_LINE_ID) = NSOLNHT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND   ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') ) RTR
ON RTR.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT= COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999)
AND RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, SUM(ATTR_PCT) SUM_RTR_PCT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV
WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL')
GROUP BY 1 , 2) RTR_SUM 
ON RTR_SUM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
--AND RTR_SUM.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND  RTR_SUM.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT= COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999)
WHERE 1=1
AND  COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999) =-9999
AND  EL.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID=COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-999)


UNION ALL

SELECT
CAST(EL.UNIQUE_ID AS VARCHAR(50) CASESPECIFIC) AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,CAST('CG' AS CHAR(8)) AS ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD
,NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(RTR.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)) as ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
,CAST(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD AS VARCHAR(12)) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,CAST(COALESCE(CAST(RTR.ATTR_PCT/CASE WHEN RTR_SUM.SUM_RTR_PCT=0 THEN 100 
ELSE RTR_SUM.SUM_RTR_PCT 
END AS DECIMAL(18,6)),
CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,6)))*100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,COALESCE(RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(8))) AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)) AS SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL.TRX_ID AS SK_TRX_ID_INT
,NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL.TRANSACTION_TYPE AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET' 
	THEN DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY 
	ELSE NSOA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY 
  END ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
,NSOA.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
,COALESCE(CAST(RTR.ATTR_PCT/CASE WHEN RTR_SUM.SUM_RTR_PCT=0 THEN 100 ELSE RTR_SUM.SUM_RTR_PCT
 END AS DECIMAL(18,6)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
--,EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS START_TV_DTM
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
FROM
(SEL NSOLNHT.* FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNHT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ERP_ACV_RTR_INCR WI_INCR
ON WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
)NSOLNHT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNT
ON NSOLNT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSO.SUMMARY_ORDER_FLG<>'Y'
INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV NSOA
WHERE  NSOA.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND NSOA.CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y')NSOA
ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB EL
ON COALESCE(EL.ERP_LINE_ID,EL.ERP_PARENT_LINE_ID) = NSOLNHT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL')) RTR
ON  RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND RTR.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, SUM(ATTR_PCT) SUM_RTR_PCT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV
WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL')
GROUP BY 1 , 2) RTR_SUM 
ON RTR_SUM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND RTR_SUM.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
WHERE EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID = NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND EL.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID = COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-999)

UNION ALL

SELECT
CAST(EL.UNIQUE_ID AS VARCHAR(50) CASESPECIFIC) AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,CAST('CG' AS CHAR(8)) AS ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD
,NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(RTR.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)) as ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
,CASE WHEN (WSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR WSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)
		THEN 'BUNDLE' 
	 ELSE 'STANDALONE' 
 END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,CAST(CASE WHEN MT_ALLOC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL 
THEN MT_ALLOC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
ELSE CASE WHEN RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
END 
AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * 100 AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,COALESCE(RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(8))) AS SALES_MOTION_CD 
,COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)) AS SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL.TRX_ID AS SK_TRX_ID_INT
,NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT)) AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL.TRANSACTION_TYPE AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME  -- MAY NEED TO ADD BOOKED DATE CONDITION
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY AS ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
,NSOLNT.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
,CAST(CASE WHEN MT_ALLOC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL 
THEN MT_ALLOC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
ELSE CASE WHEN RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
END 
AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
--,EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS START_TV_DTM
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM

FROM
(SEL NSOLNHT.* FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNHT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ERP_ACV_RTR_INCR WI_INCR
ON WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
)NSOLNHT

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNT
ON NSOLNT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSO.SUMMARY_ORDER_FLG='Y'
LEFT JOIN (SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, MAX(START_TV_DTM)  SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV
     WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'  AND POB_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN' 
     AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
     GROUP BY 1) WSOA 
     ON WSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  
  /* NRS MPOB Change */
LEFT JOIN (SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, POB_TYPE_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV 
     WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'  AND ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'OFFSET' AND POB_TYPE_CD = 'MPOB'  
     AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
     GROUP BY 1,2) WSOA_MPOB 
     ON WSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB EL
ON COALESCE(EL.ERP_LINE_ID,EL.ERP_PARENT_LINE_ID) = NSOLNHT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND   ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') ) RTR
ON RTR.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT= COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999)
AND RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, SUM(ATTR_PCT) SUM_RTR_PCT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV
WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL')
GROUP BY 1 , 2) RTR_SUM 
ON RTR_SUM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
--AND RTR_SUM.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
AND RTR_SUM.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT= COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999)  
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC MT_ALLOC
ON NSOLNT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=MT_ALLOC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
and MT_ALLOC.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999)   
and RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD=MT_ALLOC.SALES_MOTION_CD     
AND MT_ALLOC.DV_EXPIRATION_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE 1=1
AND  COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999) =-9999
AND  EL.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID=COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-999)

UNION ALL

SELECT
CAST(EL.UNIQUE_ID AS VARCHAR(50) CASESPECIFIC) AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,CAST('CG' AS CHAR(8)) AS ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD
,NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(RTR.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)) as ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
,CAST(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD AS VARCHAR(12)) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,CAST(CASE WHEN MT_ALLOC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL 
THEN MT_ALLOC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
ELSE CASE WHEN RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
END 
AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * 100 AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,COALESCE(RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(8))) AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)) AS SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL.TRX_ID AS SK_TRX_ID_INT
,NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL.TRANSACTION_TYPE AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET' 
	THEN DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY 
	ELSE NSOA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY 
  END ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
,NSOA.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
,CAST(CASE WHEN MT_ALLOC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL 
THEN MT_ALLOC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
ELSE CASE WHEN RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
END 
AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
--,EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS START_TV_DTM
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
FROM
(SEL NSOLNHT.* FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNHT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ERP_ACV_RTR_INCR WI_INCR
ON WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
)NSOLNHT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNT
ON NSOLNT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
and NSO.SUMMARY_ORDER_FLG='Y'
INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV NSOA
WHERE  NSOA.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND NSOA.CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y')NSOA
ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB EL
ON COALESCE(EL.ERP_LINE_ID,EL.ERP_PARENT_LINE_ID) = NSOLNHT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV 
WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL')) RTR
ON  RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND RTR.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, SUM(ATTR_PCT) SUM_RTR_PCT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV
WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL')
GROUP BY 1 , 2) RTR_SUM 
ON RTR_SUM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND RTR_SUM.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC MT_ALLOC
ON NSOLNT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=MT_ALLOC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
and NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=MT_ALLOC.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
and RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD=MT_ALLOC.SALES_MOTION_CD     
AND MT_ALLOC.DV_EXPIRATION_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID = NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND EL.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID = COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-999)

SELECT 
 WI.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID                
,WI.ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD             
,WI.DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WI.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY  
,WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WI.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               
,WI.SALES_MOTION_CD               
,WI.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    
,WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT                 
,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WI.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WI.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME         
,WI.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI.DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY        
,WI.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY       
,WI.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD            
,WI.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
,WI.START_TV_DTM  
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
,'SUMMARY_QUOTE_NA' AS EXCEPTION_REASON    
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WI           
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNHT ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WI.DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AND NSO.SUMMARY_ORDER_FLG='Y'
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC MT_ALLOC ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=MT_ALLOC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    AND MT_ALLOC.DV_EXPIRATION_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE   MT_ALLOC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT
EL.UNIQUE_ID
,WI.ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD
,WI.DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(RTR.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY, -9999) AS ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
,WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WI.ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,WI.SALES_MOTION_CD
,EL.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
,EL.TRX_ID
,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WI.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,WI.PRODUCT_KEY
,WI.DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
,WI.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
,WI.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
,WI.START_TV_DTM
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
,'SMR_3NF_NA' AS EXCEPTION_REASON
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WI
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLNHT ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WI.DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
	AND NSO.SUMMARY_ORDER_FLG<>'Y'
INNER JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WHERE RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID > 0  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ERP_LINE_ID,OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1) EL
	ON NSOLNHT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EL.ERP_LINE_ID	
	AND COALESCE(WI.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)=COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999)  
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV
			WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
			AND ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('BILLING','FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') ) RTR
	ON RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
	AND RTR.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT= COALESCE(EL.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999)
	AND EL.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID=COALESCE(RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-999) 
WHERE  RTR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL
